charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Primary body text, icon strokes, footer copy, nav labels

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Headings, strong emphasis, logo mark, maximum-contrast text

graphite.$description: Graphite — Muted body text, captions, secondary metadata, image alt text

fog.$description: Fog — Hairline borders, table dividers, nav separators, disabled strokes

off-white.$description: Off-White — Page canvas, card surfaces, input backgrounds

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

ember.$description: Ember — Orange supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

signal-blue.$description: Signal Blue — Blue supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

amber.$description: Amber — Announcement banner highlight, feature tag accent, promotional inline marker

ui-monospace.$description: Universal type family — used for ALL text including headings, body, nav, buttons, and tabs. The monospace-only choice is the system's signature: it forces uniform character widths across the entire interface, giving the page the rhythm of a code editor or man page rather than a traditional marketing site. Weight 500–600 for headings, 400 for body, 700 sparingly for emphasis. Negative letter-spacing (-0.006em) tightens glyphs just enough to avoid the loose feel of raw terminal output.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, default surface for all content

card-cell.$description: Surface level 1: Logo grid cells and content panels — same as canvas, defined by hairline borders

accent-banner.$description: Surface level 2: Announcement highlight pill — inline emphasis, not a full surface

inverse-band.$description: Surface level 3: Dark announcement strip, active tab background, high-contrast panels
